output.afp_benchmark_tiers: EXCELLENT < 5% / GOOD 5-10% / ACCEPTABLE 10-20% / POOR >= 20% (AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024)
output.not_legal_advice: Not financial or investment advice. Cash forecast accuracy scoring is for internal TMS benchmarking only.
output.pii_note: ZERO PII: forecast amounts, actual amounts, and horizon metadata only. No account holder, cash-pool owner, or personal data enters this kernel.
output.regulatory_basis: AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024 MAPE benchmarks; Gartner Treasury Analytics 2023 T+1/T+7/T+30 horizon tiers. MAPE = mean(|actual-forecast|/|actual|)*100; bias = mean((forecast-actual)/|actual|)*100; persistent directional bias (>75% same-sign) flagged as systematic timing issue.
output.table_source: AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024; Gartner Treasury Analytics 2023; GTreasury TMS Benchmark 2024
